title: ArrangePlaneEnvelopeDefinition Object
description: The ArrangePlaneEnvelope object represents an arrange envelope defined by a construction plane. This defines the settings of the envelope and the EnvelopeResult provides access to the resulting envelope and its contents.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

properties.name: envelopeSpacing
properties.description: Returns the parameter that controls the offset distance between envelopes when there is more than one. You can modify the value by using the properties on the returned ModelParameter object.

properties.name: frameWidth
properties.description: Returns the parameter that controls the width of the envelope frame. This defines the offset distance of the objects from the edge of the frame. You can modify the value by using the properties on the returned ModelParameter object.

properties.name: isPartialArrangeAllowed
properties.description: Gets and sets if a partial arrange is allowed for this envelope.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: length
properties.description: Returns the parameter that controls the length of the envelope frame. This defines the You can modify the value by using the properties on the returned ModelParameter object.

properties.name: objectSpacing
properties.description: Returns the parameter that controls the space between objects in the arrangement. You can modify the value by using the properties on the returned ModelParameter object.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: originXOffset
properties.description: Returns the parameter that controls the X offset of the frame from the origin of the construction plane. You can modify the value by using the properties on the returned ModelParameter object.

properties.name: originYOffset
properties.description: Returns the parameter that controls the Y offset of the frame from the origin of the construction plane. You can modify the value by using the properties on the returned ModelParameter object.

properties.name: parentArrange
properties.description: Returns the parent ArrangeFeature this envelope is associated with.

properties.name: placementClearance
properties.description: Returns the parameter that controls the offset of the objects from the base plane of the arrangement (the "up" direction). You can modify the value by using the properties on the returned ModelParameter object.

properties.name: plane
properties.description: Gets and sets the ConstructionPlane the envelope is defined on.

properties.name: quantity
properties.description: Returns the parameter that defines the number of envelopes that can be created. A value of -1 indicates that there is no limit.

properties.name: width
properties.description: Returns the parameter that controls the width of the envelope frame. This defines the You can modify the value by using the properties on the returned ModelParameter object.

classType.title: ArrangePlaneEnvelopeDefinition.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

envelopeSpacing.title: ArrangePlaneEnvelopeDefinition.envelopeSpacing Property
envelopeSpacing.description: Returns the parameter that controls the offset distance between envelopes when there is more than one. You can modify the value by using the properties on the returned ModelParameter object.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = arrangePlaneEnvelopeDefinition_var.envelopeSpacing
